name: Strawberry
description:
Vice-Admiral Strawberry (ストロベリー中将, Sutoroberī Chūjō) is one of the Vice Admirals who led the Buster Call assault on Enies Lobby. He is a relatively straight shaped person with a beard resembling Guan Yu, a legendary warrior from ancient China. He wears apparently what looks like a very long Bearskin version of the standard Marine uniform cap.   Not much is known about Strawberry's personality except that he is an honorable man, saving everyone trapped on the island before attacking. Assumably, he follows Moral Justice, or at least a more lenient version of Absolute Justice like most marines.

(Source: One Piece Wikia)
